SessionStart.description: Inject project context at session start — git branch, Python version, test status
SessionStart.command: echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\": {\"hookEventName\": \"SessionStart\", \"additionalContext\": \"Project: TaskManager API | Branch: $(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown') | Python: $(python3 --version 2>&1) | Tests: run 'pytest tests/ -v' to check status | Key files: src/main.py, src/api/, src/services/, src/models/schemas.py | Docs: docs/ | Copilot rules: .github/copilot-instructions.md\"}}"
SessionStart.osx: echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\": {\"hookEventName\": \"SessionStart\", \"additionalContext\": \"Project: TaskManager API | Branch: $(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown') | Python: $(python3 --version 2>&1) | Key files: src/main.py, src/api/, src/services/\"}}"
SessionStart.windows: echo {"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "SessionStart", "additionalContext": "Project: TaskManager API | Windows environment | Check .github/copilot-instructions.md for rules"}}

PreToolUse.description: Block dangerous terminal commands before they run. Exit 2 = hard block shown to user.

PostToolUse.description: Auto-format Python files after every edit using ruff. Also run quick lint check.
Log all tool use for audit trail

Stop.description: Before agent stops, verify tests still pass. Block if tests are failing.
